structured_payload_candidate.title: Zone Group Composition
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Each system shall be divided into separate Zone Groups, each composed of one or more zones served by a single air handler.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Each system shall be broken into separate Zone Groups composed of a collection of one or more zones served by a single air handler.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: Each system shall be broken into separate Zone Group s composed of a collection of one or more zones served by a single air handler.

evidence_quote: Each system shall be broken into separate Zone Group s composed of a collection of one or more zones served by a single air handler.
evidence_text: Each system shall be broken into separate Zone Group s composed of a collection of one or more zones served by a single air handler.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Zone Group Occupancy Schedules and Operating Modes
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Each Zone Group shall be capable of having separate occupancy schedules and operating modes from other Zone Groups.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Each Zone Group shall be capable of having separate occupancy schedules and operating modes from other Zone Groups.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: Each Zone Group  shall be capable of having separate occupancy schedules and operating modes  from other Zone Group s.

evidence_quote: Each Zone Group  shall be capable of having separate occupancy schedules and operating modes  from other Zone Group s.
evidence_text: Each Zone Group  shall be capable of having separate occupancy schedules and operating modes  from other Zone Group s.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Zone Group Operating Mode Uniformity
structured_payload_candidate.summary: All zones in a Zone Group shall be in the same zone-group operating mode. If any zone enters a mode other than Unoccupied, all zones in the group shall enter that mode.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: If one zone in a Zone Group is placed in any zone-group operating mode other than Unoccupied Mode (due to override, sequence logic, or scheduled occupancy).
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: All zones in that Zone Group shall enter that mode.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: All zones in each Zone Group  shall be in the same zone -group operating mode  as defined in Section 5.4.6 . If one zone in a Zone Group  is placed in any zone -group operating mode  other than Unoccupied Mode (due to override, sequence logic, or scheduled occupancy ), all zones in that Zone Gro up shall enter that mode.

evidence_quote: All zones in each Zone Group  shall be in the same zone -group operating mode  as defined in Section 5.4.6 . If one zone in a Zone Group  is placed in any zone -group operating mode  other than Unoccupied Mode (due to override, sequence logic, or scheduled occupancy ), all zones in that Zone Gro up shall enter that mode.
evidence_text: All zones in each Zone Group  shall be in the same zone -group operating mode  as defined in Section 5.4.6 . If one zone in a Zone Group  is placed in any zone -group operating mode  other than Unoccupied Mode (due to override, sequence logic, or scheduled occupancy ), all zones in that Zone Gro up shall enter that mode.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Occupied-Standby Mode Exclusion from Zone-Group Operating Mode
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Occupied-standby mode applies to individual zones, is considered a zonal subset of Occupied Mode, and shall not be considered a zone-group operating mode.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Occupied-standby mode shall not be considered a zone-group operating mode.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: Occupied -standby mode applies to individual zones, is considered a zonal subset of Occupied Mode , and shall not be considered a zone-group operating mode .

evidence_quote: Occupied -standby mode applies to individual zones, is considered a zonal subset of Occupied Mode , and shall not be considered a zone-group operating mode .
evidence_text: Occupied -standby mode applies to individual zones, is considered a zonal subset of Occupied Mode , and shall not be considered a zone-group operating mode .

structured_payload_candidate.title: Zone Group Single Mode at a Time
structured_payload_candidate.summary: A Zone Group may be in only one mode at a given time.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: A Zone Group may be in only one mode at a given time.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: A Zone Group  may be in only one mode at a given time.

evidence_quote: A Zone Group  may be in only one mode at a given time.
evidence_text: A Zone Group  may be in only one mode at a given time.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Zone Group Testing/Commissioning Override Switches
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Provide a set of testing/commissioning software switches that override all zones served by the Zone Group. Provide a separate software switch for each zone-level override switch listed under 'Testing and Commissioning Overrides' in terminal unit sequences.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: When the value of a Zone Group's override switch is changed, the corresponding override switch for every zone in the Zone Group shall change to the same value. Subsequently, the zone-level override switch may be changed to a different value. The value of the zone-level switch has no effect on the value of the zone-group switch, and the value of the zone-group switch only affects the zone-level switches when the zone-group switch is changed.
structured_payload_candidate.commissioning_check: Provide a separate software switch for each of the zone-level override switches listed under 'Testing and Commissioning Overrides' in terminal unit sequences.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: For each Zone Group , provide a set of testing/commissioning software switches that override all zones served by the Zone Group . Provide a separate software switch for each of the zone -level override switches listed under “Testing and Commissioning Overrides” in terminal  unit sequences. When the value of a Zone Group ’s override switch is changed, the corresponding override switch for every zone in the Zone Group  shall change to the same value. Subsequently, the zone -level override switch may be changed to a different valu e. The value of the zone -level switch has no effect on the value of the zone -group  switch, and the value of the zone -group  switch only affects the zone -level switches when the zone -group  switch is changed.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Zone Group Occupied Mode Entry Conditions
structured_payload_candidate.summary: A Zone Group is in Occupied Mode when the time of day is between the Zone Group's scheduled occupied start and stop times, or the schedules have been overridden by the occupant override system.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: When any of the following is true: a. The time of day is between the Zone Group's scheduled occupied start and stop times. b. The schedules have been overridden by the occupant override system.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: The Zone Group enters Occupied Mode.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: A Zone Group  is in the Occupied Mode  when any of the following is true: a. The time of day is between the Zone Group ’s scheduled occupied start and  stop times. b. The schedules have been overridden by the occupant override system.

evidence_quote: A Zone Group  is in the Occupied Mode  when any of the following is true: a. The time of day is between the Zone Group ’s scheduled occupied start and  stop times. b. The schedules have been overridden by the occupant override system.
